---
name: Add XML Documentation (pt1)
description: Run this first
agent: .NET XML Doc Writer
---

Add XML documentation to the projects, make sure to read all project files to understand the codebase and add comprehensive XML comments to all public classes, methods, properties, and fields. Follow C# XML documentation standards and include summaries, parameter descriptions, return value descriptions, and exception documentation where applicable. Ensure that the generated XML documentation is accurate and provides clear guidance for developers using the codebase.
